title: Phase 7: Generate deployment docs - Alma RS Lending Request Automation

batchFileResult.summary: Created production and sandbox Task Scheduler batch files. Both use --live, no --watch, no pause, exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%.

lockFileResult.summary: Added file-based lock mechanism. _acquire_lock() creates JSON lock file with PID+timestamp at output/.processor.lock, with stale lock detection via os.kill(pid,0) and corrupt file handling. _release_lock() removes lock with graceful error handling. process_single_run() wrapped in try/finally with lock acquire at start and release in finally block. All existing tests pass.

loggingResult.summary: Added 3 output channels for scheduled mode: (1) per-file processing log to output/file_logs/, (2) daily append CSV to output/reports/processed_{date}.csv, (3) daily run heartbeat to output/logs/runs_{date}.log. Added scheduled_mode parameter to __init__. setup_logging() uses TimedRotatingFileHandler in scheduled mode. main() passes scheduled_mode=not args.watch. All watch mode behavior preserved.
